html:
Foliage is a Vegetable Food Item obtained by picking a Fern. Similar to Petals, Foliage can be eaten to restore 1 Health or used as fuel in a Campfire or Fire Pit. They can also be crafted into a Potted Fern.

Dried Foliage

Exclusive to:

Dried Foliage are made from drying Foliage on the Drying Rack. They can be used to make Foliage Tea at Pearl's Tea Shop.

Cooked Foliage

Only during the Event: The Gorge

During The Gorge event, Foliage can be cooked at the Campfire in the Swamp Pig village to produce Cooked Foliage. It can be used as filler for a variety of Cooking Recipes.

Usage

×2

×4

×8 / 6 / 4

Only during the Event: The Gorge

Trivia

  • Foliage used to be green when it was implemented in the It's not a Rock! update.
    • Wilson's quote for Foliage was not changed in the update and still refers them as "Some leafy greens".
      • Wendy remarks this in DST with her quote for Ferns: "Wilson calls them 'greens'... but they're purple...".
  • Despite the fact that in The Gorge there was Cooked Foliage, in the game files this texture is called "dried".

Gallery

  • Old Foliage icon.
  • Dried variant concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.

Foliage is a Vegetable Food Item obtained by picking a Fern. Similar to Petals, Foliage can be eaten to restore 1 Health or used as fuel in a Campfire or Fire Pit. They can also be crafted into a Potted Fern.

During The Gorge event, Foliage can be cooked at the Campfire in the Swamp Pig village to produce Cooked Foliage. It can be used as filler for a variety of Cooking Recipes.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Foliage used to be green when it was implemented in the It's not a Rock! update.
Wilson's quote for Foliage was not changed in the update and still refers them as "Some leafy greens".
Wendy remarks this in DST with her quote for Ferns: "Wilson calls them 'greens'... but they're purple...".
Despite the fact that in The Gorge there was Cooked Foliage, in the game files this texture is called "dried".

'''Foliage''' is a Vegetable Food Item obtained by picking a [[Fern]]. Similar to Petals, Foliage can be eaten to restore 1 Health or used as fuel in a [[Campfire]] or [[Fire Pit]]. They can also be crafted into a [[Potted Fern]].
{{clear}}

During [[The Gorge]] event, Foliage can be cooked at the [[Campfire]] in the [[Swamp Pig]] village to produce '''Cooked Foliage'''. It can be used as filler for a variety of [[The Gorge Recipes|Cooking Recipes]].
{{clear}}

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
*Foliage used to be green when it was implemented in the ''[[Version History#It's not a rock!|It's not a Rock!]]'' update. 
**Wilson's quote for Foliage was not changed in the update and still refers them as "Some leafy greens".
***Wendy remarks this in DST with her quote for Ferns: "Wilson calls them 'greens'... but they're purple...".
* Despite the fact that in The Gorge there was Cooked Foliage, in the game files this texture is called "dried".
